title: Canva Trading Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: Named in an ASIC media release as one of four Canva Group entities, paying an infringement notice for allegedly failing to lodge an audited financial report by the statutory deadline — a corporate financial-transparency compliance matter.
scope: Received an ASIC infringement notice ($198,000) for alleged late lodgement of an audited financial report, per 26-090MR
